evidence.note: Eight-operation redacted sandbox request, identity, state-hash, readback, and safety evidence bundle.
Production creation-saga adapter with drift, idempotency, complete-profile, draft-value, and no-auto-delete gates.
Artifact, preflight, failure-injection, resume, adapter, type-aware value, filter-target, and formula-conflict tests.

limitations: Only resources created by the same exact DashboardBuildPlan are in scope.
Existing dashboard dataset rebinding and existing component-local filter updates remain blocked.
Failures retain unpublished resources and require receipt-guided manual cleanup; automatic delete is forbidden.
Publishing remains a separate confirmation and is never performed by apply-dashboard-build.
No verified clone request, identity mapping, or compensation path.
Menu scanning is read-only; folder mutation is not verified.
Dataset identities are profiled, but rebinding payload and impact scope are not verified.

evidence.note: Sandbox-only command requires an explicit sandbox identity, confirmation, full backups, schema readback, and blocks production mode before browser launch.
Field-list rebuild helper plus optional public-filter-scoped value assertions for sandbox verification.
Unit field rebuild, production-mode rejection, required-measure guards, component reference replacement, and filtered value tests.
Redacted Qingcheng sandbox evidence separates unfiltered health checks from filtered value assertions.

limitations: Sandbox-only for copy-rebuilding existing pivot components using an already-correct source unit from the same dashboard/model.
Production pivot copy/rebind is blocked_unsupported and has no CLI entrypoint or Registry allowlist.
Filtered value assertions may call value/unit with publicFilterList for a specified qici/period; unfiltered output remains diagnostic only.
The sandbox recovery path restores dashboardHtml references to the pre-write schema; copied orphan units may remain unreferenced in the backend.

evidence.note: Stable unit/group/field adapter with target-state readback and reversible recovery.
Drift, stable identity, unrelated-state preservation, and recovery tests.
Redacted live sandbox HTTP 200, multi-operation apply, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for one existing stable field display-name change; add/remove/reorder, formula/filter binding changes, and dataset rebinding remain blocked.

evidence.note: Stable unitFilterList field adapter changes only showName and restores the exact original label.
Stable identity, target-only mutation, readback, and recovery tests.
Redacted Qingcheng P4C sandbox HTTP 200, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for showName on one existing component-local filter identified by stable unit_id + field_id; condition, values, add/remove, and binding changes remain blocked.

evidence.note: Stable component adapter keeps schema componentName and data-unit unitName consistent with compensating recovery.
Schema plus unit-name projection, partial-write compensation, and exact recovery tests.
Redacted Qingcheng P4C sandbox dual-endpoint write, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for one non-empty title on an existing stable component; type, dataset, fields, style, layout, create/delete, and publication remain blocked.

evidence.note: Stable relation_id + filter_id + field_id adapter with immediate readback.
Preflight, allowlist, multi-operation recovery, apply receipt, and legacy write-block tests.
Redacted live sandbox HTTP 200, multi-operation apply, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: The platform has no server-side transaction API; P4B uses immediate readback plus compensating reverse recovery and blocks publication on any failure.

evidence.note: Stable relation_id + filter_id + field_id adapter changes only unitName and restores the original title.
Stable triple, target-only title mutation, readback, and recovery tests.
Redacted Qingcheng P4C sandbox HTTP 200, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for one non-empty title on an existing public filter identified by stable relation_id + filter_id + field_id; field, targets, values, and defaults remain unchanged.

Generic component-filter edits remain blocked. Only the separate update_component_filter_label operation may change showName; condition, values, add/remove, and binding changes have no production adapter.

evidence.note: Stable component_id + slot_key + slot_id adapter changes only one existing tab label.
Stable slot identity, membership preservation, target-only mutation, and recovery tests.
Redacted Qingcheng P4C sandbox HTTP 200, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for one non-empty label on an existing stable tab slot; slot add/delete/reorder, membership, container configuration, style, and layout remain blocked.

evidence.note: Stable node layout patch with full schema readback and target-only recovery.
Layout key allowlist, drift, unrelated-state preservation, and recovery tests.
Redacted live sandbox HTTP 200, multi-operation apply, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for x/y/w/h on an existing stable node in the same container and tab after bounds/collision validation; z, container moves, create/delete, and publication remain blocked.

evidence.note: Root background-color adapter with theme identity readback and target-only recovery.
Theme identity, unrelated-state preservation, drift, and recovery tests.
Redacted live sandbox HTTP 200, multi-operation apply, reverse recovery, and full-profile restoration evidence.

limitations: Allowlisted only for an explicit #RRGGBB dashboard-root background color on an existing dashboard. Evidence-backed styling of resources created by the same P4C plan uses the separate style_new_components capability; arbitrary existing-component styling remains blocked.

evidence.note: Redacted evidence-stage proof plus production E2E proof that all eleven metric instances across seven new data components were renamed and read back.
All-or-none metric-instance adapter with exact field coverage, readback, resume drift gate, and compensation.
Advanced Saga ordering, fault, orphan, and full metric-name coverage tests.

limitations: Only metric instances on components created by the same exact DashboardBuildPlan are in scope.
A metric rename plan must name every measure instance; partial coverage is rejected before browser launch.
Existing-component metric renames are not authorized by this capability.

evidence.note: Live Page, Text, SingleTabs, and four-PivotTable style readback with immutable evidence hashes.
Component-type property allowlists, restricted rich text, exact before/after hashes, full schema compensation, and Profile readback.
Advanced style Plan/Saga, zero-write preflight, failure, and orphan tests.

limitations: Production styling is limited to Page background, the arco_blue PivotTable preset, the wide SingleTabs preset, and the default restricted-rich-text preset; IndicatorCard, BarChart, and PieChart raw styles are not yet exposed.
Text markup is restricted to p, span, strong, and br with color, background-color, font-size, and font-weight declarations.
Only resources created by the same exact DashboardBuildPlan may be styled; arbitrary existing-component styling remains blocked.

evidence.note: Live SingleTabs creation with two named slots and two persisted, value-readable nested pivots.
Composite tab Saga adapter with slot-label, child identity, Counter-based binding, Profile, value, and resume readback.
Tab child-resource, failure, resume, orphan, and target verification tests.

limitations: Production scope is exactly one SingleTabs container with exactly two named slots per declaration and one new pivot in each slot.
Nested pivots may use governed dimensions, metrics, display names, and styles, but nested local filters are not supported in this release.
Other container types and adding slots to existing containers remain blocked.

evidence.note: Live slot_id, slot_name, label, nested component ID, and unit ID closure.
Exact logical slot-to-platform component mapping and complete target Profile verification.
Slot child-resource and target-state tests.

limitations: This capability is inseparable from create_tab_container in the same creation Saga.
Existing container slot mutation remains blocked.

evidence.note: Live Text palette creation followed by restricted rich-text styling and complete Profile readback.
Text identity, layout, restricted content/style, resume, and Profile target adapter.
Text creation, style, failure, and orphan tests.

limitations: Only new text resources declared by the exact DashboardBuildPlan are in scope.
Arbitrary HTML, links, scripts, images, event handlers, and unsupported CSS are rejected.

evidence.note: Separate publish confirmation bound to ChangePlan and ApplyReceipt hashes.
Publish preflight and receipt validation tests.

limitations: No formal published-version read API; success remains publish_requested_unverified.
Principal resolution, permission diff, write endpoint, and readback are not verified.
